message:
🌱 helm: Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts (#1840)

* 🌱 Add helm: Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add helm: Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix helm #9136 mission: remove closed PR from solution

Remove PR helm/helm#9138 from solution sourceUrls as it was closed
without merge. Keep the existing workaround resolution (use false
instead of null).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-9136-nested-null-values-do-not-remove-keys-from-sub-charts",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts",
+    "description": "Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts. This issue affects 84+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify helm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your helm installation:\n```bash\nhelm version --short\nhelm repo list\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant helm configuration:\n#2648 and #5184 allow for deletion of keys by setting null values in a values.yaml file."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts",
+        "description": "For the general pattern like this, using `false` works, although Helm complains about replacing a table with a boolean. \n```\n      {{- if .Values.redis.securityContext }}\n      securityContext: {{- toYaml .Values.redis.securityContext | nindent 8 }}\n      {{- end }}\n```\n\nHelm says it \"cannot\"\n```yaml\nkibana:\n  resources:\n    requests:\n      cpu: 1000m\n      memory: 2Gi\n    limits:\n      cpu: null\n      memory: 2Gi\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Nested `null` values do not remove keys from… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest helm to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "For the general pattern like this, using `false` works, although Helm complains about replacing a table with a boolean. \n```\n      {{- if .Values.redis.securityContext }}\n      securityContext: {{- toYaml .Values.redis.securityContext | nindent 8 }}\n      {{- end }}\n```\n\nHelm says it \"cannot\" replace the table, but ultimately does.\n\n### Some Workarounds\n1.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kibana:\n  resources:\n    requests:\n      cpu: 1000m\n      memory: 2Gi\n    limits:\n      cpu: null\n      memory: 2Gi",
+        "apiVersion: v2\nname: elastic\ndescription: Elastic stack\ntype: application\nversion: 0.0.1\ndependencies:\n  - name: kibana\n    version: 7.9.3\n    repository: \"@elastic\"",
+        "...\nresources:\n  limits:\n    cpu: 1000m\n    memory: 2Gi\n  requests:\n    cpu: 1000m\n    memory: 2Gi"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "helm",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "helm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "expert",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/helm/helm/issues/9136",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/helm/helm"
+    },
+    "reactions": 84,
+    "comments": 56,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "helm"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working helm installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:37:47.583Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
